title: [Teras Isle, Underwater]
description: Light streams gently through the water from the surface above as the trench opens into a large, underwater chasm.  Innumberable species of brightly colored life seem to ignore any encroachment into their habitat, swimming, skittering, and floating about with limitless abandon.

Light streams gently through the water from the surface above as the trench opens into a large, underwater chasm.  Innumerable species of brightly colored life seem to ignore any encroachment into their habitat, swimming, skittering, and floating about with limitless abandon.
